title: NornTranslateState — AgentEvent to AssistantEvent translation
purpose: The event translation layer that converts Norn's typed AgentEvent/ProviderEvent stream into the same AssistantEvent variants that the Claude Runner path produces. This is what makes the frontend, persistence, and WebSocket layers runtime-agnostic — they receive identical AssistantEvent streams regardless of which runtime generated them.
task:
Implement NornTranslateState in assistant/norn_translate.rs. It consumes AgentEvent values (which wrap ProviderEvent with agent identity) and produces Vec<AssistantEvent>. It tracks tool call state, sub-agent identity, and turn boundaries. It synthesizes a SessionStarted event from configuration before the first real event. The existing workflow norn_translate.rs is the pattern reference but produces different output types.

Dependency setup: No new cargo dependencies. The norn crate (ProviderEvent, AgentEvent, Usage types) is already a dependency of meridian-services.

requirements.title: NornTranslateState struct and constructor
requirements.spec: NornTranslateState SHALL be a struct with state for: active tool calls (HashMap<String, String> mapping tool_call_id to tool_name), root agent ID (Uuid), emitted tool IDs (HashSet<String>), active sub-agents (HashMap<String, String>), session_started flag (bool), and session config metadata for synthesizing SessionStarted.
acceptance: NornTranslateState is defined in assistant/norn_translate.rs
Constructor accepts root_agent_id: Uuid and session config metadata (model, tools, context_window, agents, skills, mcp_servers)
All state fields are initialized empty/false

requirements.title: Streaming delta translations
requirements.spec: WHEN a ProviderEvent::TextDelta is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::TextDelta. WHEN ProviderEvent::ThinkingDelta is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::ThinkingDelta. Both SHALL carry the session_id.
acceptance: TextDelta maps 1:1 with text field preserved
ThinkingDelta maps 1:1 with thinking field preserved
Both carry the correct session_id

requirements.title: Tool lifecycle translations
requirements.spec: WHEN ProviderEvent::ToolCallComplete is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::ToolUseStarted with tool_call_id, tool_name, and parsed input from the arguments JSON. WHEN ProviderEvent::ToolCallDelta is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::ToolInputDelta with the tool_call_id resolved from state. WHEN ProviderEvent::ToolResult is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::ToolResult with result, is_error, and tool_call_id.
acceptance: ToolCallComplete produces ToolUseStarted with complete input parsed from arguments JSON
ToolCallDelta produces ToolInputDelta with tool_call_id from ToolCallDelta.id
ToolResult produces ToolResult with is_error derived from output content
Tool call ID is tracked in active_tool_calls state
Duplicate tool IDs are not re-emitted (emitted_tool_ids dedup)

requirements.title: Complete snapshot translations
requirements.spec: WHEN ProviderEvent::TextComplete is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::AssistantMessage with the complete text (replay-only, not sent live). WHEN ProviderEvent::ThinkingComplete is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::AssistantThinking with the complete thinking text (replay-only).
acceptance: TextComplete maps to AssistantMessage
ThinkingComplete maps to AssistantThinking
Both have is_replay_only() returning true
Both carry correct session_id

requirements.title: Turn completion and usage translations
requirements.spec: WHEN ProviderEvent::Done is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::Usage with is_turn_final: true (input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens mapped from usage.cache_read_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens mapped from usage.cache_write_tokens) followed by AssistantEvent::TurnComplete. Usage SHALL be emitted before TurnComplete. Per-turn state SHALL be cleared after emitting these events.
acceptance: Done produces Usage then TurnComplete in that order
Usage has is_turn_final: true
cache_read_input_tokens comes from Norn Usage.cache_read_tokens
cache_creation_input_tokens comes from Norn Usage.cache_write_tokens
active_tool_calls, emitted_tool_ids, and active_sub_agents are cleared after Done

requirements.title: Error translation
requirements.spec: WHEN ProviderEvent::Error is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL produce AssistantEvent::Error with the error message formatted via Display.
acceptance: Error produces AssistantEvent::Error
Error message is formatted from ProviderError via Display
session_id is correct

requirements.title: Synthesized SessionStarted event
requirements.spec: WHEN the first real AgentEvent is received AND session_started is false, THE SYSTEM SHALL emit a synthesized AssistantEvent::SessionStarted with model, tools, context_window, agents, skills, and mcp_servers from the configuration provided at construction. THE SYSTEM SHALL set session_started to true. Subsequent events SHALL NOT re-emit SessionStarted.
acceptance: SessionStarted is emitted before the first real event
SessionStarted contains model name, tool list, context_window, agents, skills, mcp_servers
SessionStarted is emitted exactly once per session

requirements.title: Sub-agent event wrapping
requirements.spec: WHEN an AgentEvent has agent_id != root_agent_id, THE SYSTEM SHALL wrap the translated events in AssistantEvent::SubAgentEvent with the agent_id as a string. WHEN a ToolCallComplete matches a delegation tool name (referenced via constants from the norn crate, not hardcoded strings), THE SYSTEM SHALL also emit SubAgentStarted. WHEN a ToolResult for an active sub-agent is received, THE SYSTEM SHALL also emit SubAgentCompleted.
acceptance: Events from child agents (agent_id != root) are wrapped in SubAgentEvent
Delegation tool detection uses norn::tools::agent::SPAWN_TOOL_NAME and FORK_TOOL_NAME constants (not string literals 'Task' or 'Agent')
Delegation tool calls emit SubAgentStarted with description from tool arguments
ToolResult for an active sub-agent emits SubAgentCompleted
Sub-agent tracking uses agent_id (Uuid as String), not parent_tool_use_id

dependency_setup: No new cargo dependencies. The norn crate (ProviderEvent, AgentEvent, Usage types) is already a dependency of meridian-services.
boundaries: SHALL NOT modify the existing TranslateState (ClaudeEvent translator)
SHALL NOT modify AssistantEvent variants — produce existing variants only
SHALL NOT modify ws/assistant.rs, persistence.rs, or streaming.rs
SHALL NOT implement the Norn session loop (NR-002 scope — this brief provides the translator that NR-002 calls)
verification: Every ProviderEvent variant has a corresponding test in norn_translate.rs
TextDelta, ThinkingDelta produce the expected AssistantEvent variants
Done → Usage(is_turn_final: true) + TurnComplete in correct order
SessionStarted is synthesized once, before the first real event
Sub-agent wrapping works for child agent_ids
cargo test -p meridian-services passes all new tests
